folio.label: 201r
folio.l: And ©et in wrong , is al thy ¹seueraunce
Wostow nat how , oure mygúty Pénces free
Ben thus comaunded , and mad ordinaunce
That euäy césten wygút , shal han penaunce
But if that he , his cristendom witú seye
And goon al quyt , if he wol it reneye
¢ ñoure Pénces erren , as ©oure nobleye dootú

note.notetxt: 449Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Quod tho Cecile , and witú a wood sentence
ñe make vs gilty , and is nat sootú
For ©e æ knowen wel , oure Innocence
For as muche , as we doon a reuerence
To crist , and for we bere a cristene name
ñe putte on vs a cryme , and eke a blame
¢ But we æ knowen , thilke name so

note.notetxt: 456Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: For vätuous , we moun it nougút w seye
Almache answerde , chees on of theise twoo
Do sacéfise , or cristendom reneye
That æè mowe now , escapen by that weye
At whicú , this holy blisful , faire mayde
Gan for to laugúe , and to the Iuge she seide
¢ O Iuge confus , in thy nycetee

note.notetxt: 463Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Woltow , æ I reneye , Innocence
To maken me , a wykked wigút , quod she
Lo he dissimuletú here , in audience
He staretú and wodetú , in his aduätence
To whom Almachius seide , vnsely wrecche
Ne wostow nat , how fer my mygút may strecche
¢ Han nougút oure mygúty pénces , to me ©euen

note.notetxt: 470Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: ña , bothe power , and auctoritee
To maken folk , to dyen or to lyuen
Why spekestow so proudly , tha~ne to me
I speke nougút , but stedfastly quod she
Nat proudly , for I seye as for my syde
We haten dedly , thilke vice of pride
¢ And if æè drede nougút , a sotú for to heere

note.notetxt: 477 Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.Est

folio.l: Tha~ne wol I shewe , al openly by rigút
That æè hast mad , a ful gret lesyng heere
Thow seist , thyne pénces , han the ©euen mygút
Bothe for to sleen , and for to quyken a wigút
Thow æ ne maist , but oonly lyf byreue
Thow hast noon oother power , ne no leue
¢ But æè maist seyn , thyne pénces han the maked

note.notetxt: 484Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP
